raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/scrub> 2025 I sent a payment to a seller over XXXX using my American Express account. It turned out to be a scam so I initially reported it to XXXX. The next day I check my XXXX dispute to see that it was rejected. There was no communication as to why they declined my request so I sent them a second email explaining my frustrations and asking why I was rejected. I have never received a response. I then contacted American Express twice through the online chat to dispute the charges and was declined both times, but was instructed to call AMEX customer service to get the help I needed. I then called American Express customer service and explained the whole situation. The man on the phone said he spoke to his supervisor and that they werent going to refund me and they werent responsible for it. I was then told by the American Express customer service representative that the XXXX XXXX XXXX  was a federal agency responsible for getting me my refund and to contact them. I do not know how to escalate my issue any further to get this resolved but I know for a fact that the XXXX XXXX XXXX is not a federal agency and I dont know how the company can lie to me about that without repercussions.
